summary: Iteration 7 — Identity & Security Module. Backend: NEW /app/backend/tests/test_security_module.py = 18/18 PASSED in 8.3s. Full repo regression = 107/107 PASSED in 172.7s (prior 89 untouched + 18 new). Verified end-to-end: (a) POST /api/seed-demo creates exactly 11 brokers (4 pii_found / 1 opt_out_pending / 2 removed / 2 scanning / 2 clear), 3 credit scores (Equifax 672, TransUnion 681, Experian 668, all is_demo:true), 18 credit_history points (3 bureaus x 6 months), 1 hard_inquiry (Chase Sapphire), 3 active breach_records (LinkedIn 2021, Canva 2019, Adobe 2013, is_demo:true), 5 security_alerts. (b) GET /api/security/overview returns threat_score ~8.5 on fresh seed (asserted 7.5-10), security_health_score clamped 0-100, stats {brokers_with_data:4, opt_outs_pending:1, confirmed_removals:2, active_breaches:3}. (c) GET /api/security/brokers returns 11 with exact distribution. (d) POST /api/security/brokers/rescan advances last_scanned_at for at least one broker. (e) POST /api/security/brokers/{id}/opt-out returns letter, transitions pii_found→opt_out_pending, appends SecurityAlert, 404 on bogus id. (f) GET /api/security/brokers/{id}/opt-out-letter contains 'CCPA' + 'Right to Delete', 404 on bogus id. (g) GET /api/security/credit returns 3 scores + 18 history + hard_inquiries[] + is_demo:true. (h) PUT /api/security/credit accepts partial {equifax} and updates current_score=720, prev=672, is_demo→false; rejects 200 with 400; after updating all 3 bureaus the top-level is_demo flips to false on next GET. (i) POST /api/security/credit/refresh-tip — REAL Claude call (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) returned successfully and the tip is dict-shaped {tip, target_lender, expected_gain_points}; verified cache: subsequent GET /api/security/credit returns identical tip + matching tip_generated_at. (j) GET /api/security/breach returns 3 active demo breaches, has_hibp_key:false, checked_email==test1@plos.app. (k) PUT /api/profile/hibp-key flips has_hibp_key→true and back to false on empty string. (l) POST /api/security/breach/{id}/resolve transitions status→resolved; 404 on bogus id. (m) GET /api/security/identity-theft-guide returns 6 steps with expected step_ids {freeze_credit, ftc_report, police_report, contact_financial, change_passwords, fraud_alert}; contact_financial.description contains seeded lender names ('Chase Sapphire' verified). (n) POST /api/security/identity-theft-guide/check persists toggle on→off across calls; 400 when step_id missing. Frontend (mobile 390x844): login test1@plos.app → tapped 'Security' tab. Tab label is 'Security' (changed from Safety), shield icon, red/warning threat-dot visible (safety-threat-dot computed bg=rgb(245,158,11) warning — threat 5.5 after mutation; logic confirmed: >=6 danger / >=3 warning / else success). Overview rendered: security-hero, security-health-ring, security-stats, 4 link tiles (link-brokers/credit/breach/guide) all present, 'X active' chip, live alerts feed with refresh ('Opt-out submitted to Spokeo' alert auto-appended by backend test visible). /security/brokers: DEMO MODE banner ('Scan results are seeded. Live broker scanning requires an Optery / DeleteMe integration (TODO).'), 11 broker cards, status pills colored (PII FOUND red, OPT-OUT PENDING yellow, REMOVED green, SCANNING gray, CLEAR green), 'Send Opt-Out' button only on pii_found rows (3 visible after backend tests submitted 1 opt-out), 'View Letter' button, 'Broker form' external link. Rescan button tapped → succeeded. /security/credit: DEMO MODE not visible after credit PUT flipped is_demo:false (correct), 'Update My Real Scores' button visible, 3 bureau cards (Equifax 720 +48, TransUnion 715 +34, Experian 705 +37) with delta chips, Hard Inquiries section (Chase Sapphire ~24 mo on report), 6-Month Trend SVG chart, 'This Month's Improvement Tip' card 'Powered by Claude' + Refresh button + tip text ('Pay down your Chase Sapphire by $2,100 this month ...'). Edit modal opened via update-scores. /security/breach: DEMO MODE banner, 'HavelBeenPwned API Key' card with input + Save button, 2 active exposures (Canva 2019 / Adobe 2013 — LinkedIn moved to Resolved by backend test), data-type tags, 'I've updated the password' resolve buttons, Resolved section with LinkedIn 2021. HIBP key save tested. /security/identity-theft-guide: red intro 'If your identity is stolen, do this NOW.', '0 / 6 steps complete' counter, all 6 step-toggle-{id} testIDs present, Step 4 contact_financial mentions Chase Sapphire/Wells Fargo/Nelnet/Toyota Financial, Step 5 includes 'Open Breach Monitor' link. Toggle tap on freeze_credit → counter updated to '1 / 6'. Regression: home dashboard loaded with $530K net worth + $8.9K income visible; no red screen; no API 4xx/5xx during navigation. Console deprecation warnings 'shadow*' / pointerEvents persist (carry-over). Deprecated packages detected: none new for this iteration. SDK 54 version drift persists (carry-over from iteration 6): expo@54.0.34, expo-font@14.0.11, expo-router@6.0.23.

issues: Carry-over (iteration 6): 'shadow*' style props deprecated → use boxShadow; props.pointerEvents → use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over SDK 54 drift: expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (expected ~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (expected ~6.0.24). Reference: /app/frontend/package.json

action_items: (Carry-over) `yarn expo install --fix` to fix expo/expo-font/expo-router minor version drift.
(Carry-over) Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents.
(Carry-over) server.py is now ~3278 LOC after Security module additions — split into routers (auth, finance, debt, mortgage, career, investments, health, ai, dashboard, alerts, security).
critical_code_review_comments: Security module endpoints all properly guarded with get_current_user_id; per-user scoping via user_id key on data_brokers / credit_scores / credit_history / hard_inquiries / breach_records / security_alerts / credit_tips / identity_theft_checklist.
POST /api/security/credit/refresh-tip persists tip as dict (not string) under credit_tips.tip — GET /api/security/credit returns the cached dict; refresh-tip is idempotent (upsert on user_id key).

PUT /api/security/credit correctly accepts partial bureau updates, returns 400 outside 300-850, sets is_demo:false on each upsert; top-level is_demo on GET = any() over scores (so a single PUT only flips that bureau and the doc-level remains True until all three are updated).
Opt-out endpoint chains: status update on broker + new SecurityAlert insert + returns formatted letter — single atomic-feeling action from caller's POV.
Letter generator includes CCPA / Right to Delete language + user's full_name from profile — verified in test_opt_out_letter_get and in submit response.

Identity-theft-guide.contact_financial description is rebuilt on every GET from current debts.lender list — so changing user's debts automatically updates the step. Lenders capped at 4 for readability.
Threat score / health score formulas are pure functions of brokers/breaches/inquiries/scores — testable + deterministic given seed.
404 vs 400 disambiguation correct: bogus id → 404 (matched_count==0), opt_out_available=false → 400.

Frontend SafetyIcon dot logic mirrors backend threat thresholds: >=6 danger, >=3 warning, else success — verified in DOM computed style after mutation lowered threat to 5.5 → dot rgb(245,158,11)=warning.

All required testIDs present and matching the spec hierarchy: tab-safety (tabBarTestID set), safety-threat-dot, security-hero, security-health-ring, security-stats, link-{brokers,credit,breach,guide}, rescan-button, broker-{id}, broker-opt-out-{id}, update-scores, refresh-tip, credit-edit-modal, hibp-key-input, hibp-save, breach-{id}, resolve-{id}, step-toggle-{step_id}.
server.py crossed 3000 LOC — overdue for router-level decomposition (carry-over).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_security_module.py (NEW — 18 tests across overview, brokers, credit incl. real Claude tip + cache verification, breach incl. HIBP key toggle + resolve, identity-theft-guide incl. lender presence + persistence)

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 new security tests in 8.3s + 89/89 regression = 107/107 cumulative in 172.7s; includes a real Claude refresh-tip call)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (login → Security tab → overview hero/rings/4 module tiles → brokers list+rescan → credit bureaus+inquiries+chart+tip → breach DEMO banner+HIBP save+resolve → identity-theft-guide 6 steps+toggle 0→1→lender names+Open Breach Monitor link)

seed_data_creation: None — relied on POST /api/seed-demo (canonical PRD seed) executed by the autouse fixture in test_security_module.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://life-os-hub-32.preview.emergentagent.com. Creds /app/memory/test_credentials.md (test1@plos.app / test123). /api/auth/login is FLAT {token,user_id,email,full_name}. Pytest dir now has 7 files = 107 cumulative tests (test_plos_api 30, test_dashboard_alerts_ai 8, test_finance_v3 12, test_career_module 8, test_investments_module 17, test_investments_crud 14, test_security_module 18). Security collections: data_brokers, security_alerts, credit_scores, credit_history, credit_tips (tip is dict {tip,target_lender,expected_gain_points}), hard_inquiries, breach_records, identity_theft_checklist (completed map). Real Claude call in refresh-tip — finished in ~7s during run, but allow up to 180s. Frontend testIDs: tab-safety (tabBarTestID, click via text 'Security' for E2E), safety-threat-dot, security-hero, security-health-ring, security-stats, link-{brokers,credit,breach,guide}, brokers-back, rescan-button, mocked-banner (brokers DEMO banner), broker-{id}, broker-opt-out-{id}, credit-back, credit-demo-banner, update-scores, refresh-tip, credit-tip-card, bureau-{equifax|transunion|experian}, credit-edit-modal, credit-edit-modal-close, breach-back, breach-demo-banner, hibp-key-card, hibp-key-input, hibp-save, breach-{id}, resolve-{id}, guide-back, guide-intro, step-{id}, step-toggle-{id}, step-link-{id}-{label}. NOTE: Running the full backend suite reseeds + mutates data (opt-out, resolve breach, credit update) so threat_score drops from ~8.5 to ~5.5 during the run — that's expected.
rca_of_issue: N/A — Identity & Security module ships clean. No functional issues found. Only outstanding items are carry-over SDK drift + style deprecation warnings from prior iterations, plus the recurring recommendation to split server.py.
